notes: AKB-13 r3: tips woven in. s01 (welcome) narrates unambiguous tip; s05 narrates 3-4 pairs tip; s07 wrap-up only (parallel structure tip is on-screen tooltip). ONLY Liam (VCgLBmBjldJmfphyB8sZ) and Alice (Xb7hH8MSUJpSbSDYk0k2) used.

steps.display_text: A Match Pairs slide challenges participants to connect prompts with answers — great for vocabulary, capitals, and more. Keep each item short and unambiguous so every prompt has exactly one clear match.
steps.tts_text: A Match Pairs slide challenges participants to connect prompts with answers — great for vocabulary, capitals, and more. Keep each item short and unambiguous so every prompt has exactly one clear match.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Match Pairs from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Match Pairs from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Type your matching challenge in the question field.
steps.tts_text: Type your matching challenge in the question field.

steps.display_text: Type the first prompt. Aim for 3 to 4 pairs — enough to be engaging without crowding a mobile screen.
steps.tts_text: Type the first prompt. Aim for 3 to 4 pairs — enough to be engaging without crowding a mobile screen.

steps.display_text: Now type the matching answer. The answer column shuffles automatically so participants can't just copy the order.
steps.tts_text: Now type the matching answer. The answer column shuffles automatically so participants can't just copy the order.

steps.display_text: That is all it takes. Hit Present and your participants race to match every pair.
steps.tts_text: That is all it takes. Hit Present and your participants race to match every pair.

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i match-pairs-r3-trimmed.webm -i s01.mp3 -i s02.mp3 -i s03.mp3 -i s04.mp3 -i s05b.mp3 -i s06.mp3 -i s07c.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=11500|11500[a2];[3:a]adelay=14000|14000[a3];[4:a]adelay=17400|17400[a4];[5:a]adelay=20600|20600[a5];[6:a]adelay=27700|27700[a6];[7:a]adelay=33800|33800[a7];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7]amix=inputs=7:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k match-pairs-r3-narrated.webm
